name: Cheese Cake,white Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a medium bowl and blend well.
2. Press into the bottom and 2 inches up the sides of a 10-inch spring form pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes. Cool.
4. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese and 1 cup sugar; beat until fluffy.
5. Add sour cream and vanilla; mix well.
6. Stir in melted white chocolate.
7. Beat egg whites at high speed until foamy. Add cream of tartar and continue beating until soft peaks form.
8. Fold the egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
9. Spoon into the crust.
10. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes, then turn off the oven.
11. Leave the cheesecake in the oven with the door open for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Cool and chill for 8 hours before serving.
Yield: 10 - 12 servings
